note: SHA256 + size of local checkpoints at release-prep time. After uploading to the GitHub Release, scripts/download_checkpoints.py verifies downloads against these hashes.

runs/resnet50/best.pt.description: v1 baseline ResNet50 (ensemble member; pre-Phase-C deployed default)

runs/resnet50_v2/best.pt.description: Phase C winner — focal loss + balanced sampler; CURRENT production single-model default (mel recall 73.40% HAM, T=0.898)

runs/resnet50_v1_backup/best.pt.description: byte-identical backup of runs/resnet50 for rollback
